texto: The world class restaurant is my sweet home.... and the world class chef is my mom.... now I'm staying in the restaurant and having some of my favorite foods with the champagne of my tube-well and the whole area is overwhelmed by the chirping of crickets. It's a by default candle light dinner due to adorable load shedding. It feels like I'm in heaven and a heaven-sent mom has been assigned for my caring!!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Khandakar Noushadur Rahman: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a tempo. O trecho “The world class restaurant is my sweet home.... and the world class chef is my mom.... now I'm st…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, beautiflul, home pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de home e moments.
